# Dental Member Network

> A membership network for US dental practice owners that pairs a 24/7
> expert helpline with a partner-discount catalog, a kit library of
> proven playbooks, and a Book Club track. Each member problem gets a
> written action plan from a real human within 2–3 business days.

## What it is

- Membership-based, not lead-gen. Members pay $49/month (founding) or
  $199/month (standard) for ongoing access — no upsell into a coaching
  contract.
- The helpline is the differentiator: leave a voicemail about any
  practice problem, get a written action plan + recommended experts.
- Partner discounts average $6,400/year in net savings for active
  members.
- Resource library: ~30 kits across Practice Management, Front Desk,
  Team & Culture, Patient Experience tracks + a Book Club track
  (Atomic Habits, Good to Great, The 7 Habits, etc.).

## For whom

- **Members** — Owners and decision-makers in US dental practices
  (solo, group, DSO-curious). Best fit: practices with $1M–$5M revenue
  doing 1–4 chairs who want to reduce reliance on PPO networks and
  improve case acceptance.
- **Experts** — Coaches, consultants, and specialists who want to
  reach 10,000+ engaged practice owners without running their own
  marketing funnel.
- **Partners** — Software, supplies, labs, equipment, marketing
  agencies, and training programs serving US dental practices.

## Pricing

- Founding member: $49/month or $490/year — first 100 only, then sold
  out. Rate locked for life while membership is active.
- Standard member: $199/month or $1,990/year after founding sells out.
- Cancel anytime, two clicks from the account page. No retention
  contract.
- Detailed pricing: https://dentalmembernetwork.com/pricing.md

## Differentiators

- One-membership-is-the-product model — no funneling into $20K
  coaching contracts.
- Written action plans signed by a real human (not an AI bot).
- Partner discounts and resource kits curated by Gary Takacs
  (Thriving Dentist) and the founding team — not by algorithm.
- Book Club track: read alongside named principle videos, downloadable
  study guides and discussion prompts.

## Free resources

- Negotiating Better PPO Fees — free kit (script + checklist +
  worksheet), email-gated: https://dentalmembernetwork.com/#free-kit
- Public resources teaser: https://dentalmembernetwork.com/resources
